Off Calendar Dec-21-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jeffrey E. McFadden, 202-429-8022, and Kevin C. Mayer, 213-439-9422, of Steptoe & Johnson, LLP, appearing for defendant and responding party Metropolitan Life Insurance Company
Jeffrey A. Kaiser of Levin Simes & Kaiser, LLP, 646-7174, appearing for plaintiffs and moving parties

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS ERNEST BABER and JANICE BABER'S Motion For Relief From Judgment (CCP 473) Or, In The Alternative, Motion For Reconsideration Or For A New Trial is granted. CCP 473(b). Judgment was entered against plaintiff based on his failure to file opposition to Motion for Summary Judgment which plaintiff's counsel declares was the result of his error in not filing a dismissal before the opposition was due, when a dismissal would still have been timely. Had counsel not made that error, summary judgment would not have been entered. The failure to file a timely dismissal was the result of an error of communication within counsel's office, therefore the Court's decision to grant summary judgment in favor of Metropolitan Life Insurance Company will be vacated. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/CK) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR# 11604
